use_cases: User text input in web forms with validation error display
Comment or message composition with inline error feedback
Contact forms requiring text input with error state management
Description or notes fields with error messaging support
Any form requiring multi-line text input with built-in error handling
ai_summary: A Shugar design system textarea component with optional error state handling. Features size variants (small, medium, large), error message display with icon and action link support, and clean Tailwind CSS styling with red accent colors for error states. Part of the shugar component library on 21st.dev, designed for integration into forms requiring text input with validation feedback.
